# Transform Group

> Transform Group is the world's most accomplished digital asset strategy and public relations agency. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in San Juan, Puerto Rico, it was the first firm to specialize in blockchain PR and now represents a broad range of clients across digital assets, deep tech, AI, entertainment, and fintech. A division of Transform Ventures, LLC.

## Key facts

- Founded: 2013 (launched Mastercoin, the first token sale in history; first mainstream PR firm with a dedicated blockchain practice)
- Founder & CEO: Michael Terpin (also co-founded BitAngels and founded Globe Newswire)
- Headquarters: San Juan, Puerto Rico
- Offices: Las Vegas, Los Angeles, Miami, Paris, Dublin
- Clients served: 300+ worldwide
- Token launches supported: 150+ (including Ethereum, EOS, Tether, Bancor, Lisk, Qtum, SALT Lending, WAX)
- By 2021, client holdings represented 57% of the total alt-coin market cap
- Contact: info@transformgroup.com

## Divisions

- TransformPR — full-service media relations, podcast placement, thought leadership, and social outreach (SocialRadius): /division-pr.html
- TransformStrategies — business development, tokenomics, and AI strategy: /division-strategies.html
- TransformEvents — conference speaking, panel bookings, and sponsorship; sister brands BitAngels and Tokenize!: /division-events.html
- SocialRadius — pioneering, award-winning social media agency (Webby, Cannes Titanium Lion, Emmy), now part of Transform Ventures: /socialradius.html

## Pages

- Home: /
- Team / leadership: /team.html
- Divisions: /division-pr.html, /division-strategies.html, /division-events.html, /socialradius.html

## Media coverage

Client placements secured across Bloomberg, The Wall Street Journal, The New York Times, Reuters, Forbes, CNBC, Financial Times, CoinDesk, Cointelegraph, Decrypt, The Block, and Blockworks, among others.
